'''chavungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabihah|zabihah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabihah|zabihah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chavungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chævingith|chævingith]] || [[word:chævingij|chævingij]] || [[word:chævingish|chævingish]] || [[word:chævingi|chævingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavuvunguth|chavuvunguth]] || [[word:chavuvunguj|chavuvunguj]] || [[word:chavuvungush|chavuvungush]] || [[word:chavuvungu|chavuvungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavunguth|chavunguth]] || [[word:chavunguj|chavunguj]] || [[word:chavungush|chavungush]] || [[word:chavungu|chavungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavufnguth|chavufnguth]] || [[word:chavufnguj|chavufnguj]] || [[word:chavufngush|chavufngush]] || [[word:chavufnguf|chavufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chavunguthu|chavunguthu]] || [[word:chavunguju|chavunguju]] || [[word:chavungushu|chavungushu]] || [[word:chavunguku|chavunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chavunguth|chavunguth]] || [[word:chavunguj|chavunguj]] || [[word:chavungush|chavungush]] || [[word:chavungu|chavungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chavunguthul|chavunguthul]] || [[word:chavungujul|chavungujul]] || [[word:chavungushul|chavungushul]] || [[word:chavungukul|chavungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chavunguthuthu|chavunguthuthu]] || [[word:chavungujuju|chavungujuju]] || [[word:chavungushushu|chavungushushu]] || [[word:chavunguku|chavunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chavunguthun|chavunguthun]] || [[word:chavungujun|chavungujun]] || [[word:chavungushun|chavungushun]] || [[word:chavungukun|chavungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chavunguthuoro|chavunguthuoro]] || [[word:chavungujuoro|chavungujuoro]] || [[word:chavungushuoro|chavungushuoro]] || [[word:chavungukuoro|chavungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
